Which order is improper for amine compounds?

options.A: Order of basicity in aq. medium: $\text{CH}_3 - \text{NH} - \text{CH}_3 > \text{CH}_3\text{NH}_2 > \text{CH}_3 - \text{N} - \text{CH}_3$
options.C: Order of basicity in gaseous state: $\text{CH}_3 - \text{N} - \text{CH}_3 > \text{CH}_3 - \text{NH} - \text{CH}_3 > \text{CH}_3\text{NH}_2$

Identify 'C' in the following reaction. $	ext{C}_6	ext{H}_5	ext{NO}_2 ightarrow 	ext{Fe/HCl} ightarrow 	ext{'A'} ightarrow 	ext{NaNO}_2+	ext{HCl} ightarrow 	ext{'B'} ightarrow 	ext{H}_2	ext{O} ightarrow 	ext{'C'}$

Which is the correct order of the basic strength of given amines?

options.A: $(	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5)_2	ext{NH} > 	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2 > 	ext{C}_6	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2 > 	ext{NH}_3$
options.B: $(	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5)_2	ext{NH} > 	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2 > 	ext{NH}_3 > 	ext{C}_6	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2$
options.C: $	ext{NH}_3 > 	ext{C}_6	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2 > (	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5)_2	ext{NH} > 	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2$
options.D: $	ext{C}_6	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2 > (	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5)_2	ext{NH} > 	ext{C}_2	ext{H}_5	ext{NH}_2 > 	ext{NH}_3$

questions.question: Which diazonium salt is water insoluble and stable at room temperature?

options.B: It does not react with Hinsberg's reagent.
options.C: It has one Isomer of $2^\circ$ amine.
options.D: It does not give Azo dye test.

questions.question: The most reactive amine towards dil. $\text{HCl}$ is ____.
Assertion: Only small amount of $\text{HCl}$ is required in reduction of Nitrocompound with iron scrap. Reason: $\text{FeCl}_2$, formed gets hydrolysed to release $\text{HCl}$ during the reaction.

options.A: Assertion is wrong but Reason is correct.
options.B: Both Assertion and Reason are correct, Reason give correct explanation for Assertion.
options.C: Assertion is correct but Reason is wrong.
options.D: Both Assertion and Reason are correct, Reason does not give correct explanation for Assertion.
